statement: In every magma, Equation 1787 (`x = (y * z) * ((y * w) * w)`) implies Equation 4215 (`x * y = ((z * y) * y) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0123
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op y w) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z y) y) w)
